evaluation.initialPromptTemplate:
Rate job 0-10 for candidate targeting entry-level roles in configured locations.

GOOD FIELDS: Marketing, Business Dev, Operations, Admin, Strategy, HR
BAD FIELDS: Engineering, Data Science, Finance, Legal, Medical
GOOD LEVEL: Entry, Junior, Intern, Graduate, Trainee, Assistant
BAD LEVEL: Senior, Lead, Director, 5+ years

Job: "{{POSITION}}" at {{COMPANY}} ({{LOCATION}})

Respond JSON only:
{"score": X, "recommend": true/false, "reasons": ["brief reason"]}
evaluation.batchPromptTemplate:
Rate jobs 0-10 for candidate targeting entry-level roles in configured locations.

GOOD FIELDS: Marketing, Business Dev, Operations, Admin, Strategy, HR
BAD FIELDS: Engineering, Data Science, Finance, Legal, Medical
GOOD LEVEL: Entry, Junior, Intern, Graduate, Trainee, Assistant
BAD LEVEL: Senior, Lead, Director, 5+ years

{{JOBS}}
Respond with JSON array:
[{"jobId": 1, "score": X, "recommend": true/false, "reasons": ["brief reason"]}, ...]

notification.emailSubjectTemplate: Job Alert: {{COUNT}} New Recommended Jobs Found!
notification.headerSubtitle: Your personalized job matches are ready!
notification.summaryTemplate: Summary: Found {{COUNT}} highly recommended jobs that match your CV and criteria.
notification.footerLineOne: This email was generated by your Job Scorer system
notification.footerLineThree: Keep building your career, one opportunity at a time!

cv.fallbackText: CV not available. Candidate background unavailable.
